title: Input Air Controlled
description: When configured as a rideable entity, the entity will be controlled using WASD controls and mouse to move in three dimensions.

backwards_movement_modifier.title: Backwards Movement Modifier
backwards_movement_modifier.description:
Modifies speed going backwards.

Sample values:
• happy_ghast: 0.5

strafe_speed_modifier.title: Strafe Speed Modifier
strafe_speed_modifier.description:
Modifies the strafe speed.

Sample values:
• happy_ghast: 1
